LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES INCORPORATED'S PETITION FOR APPOINTMENT OF ARBITRATOR. EACH PARTY MAY SUBMIT TO THE COURT NO LATER THAN MONDAY NOVEMBER 23, 2009 A LIST OF 5 PROPOSED ARBITRATORS ALONG WITH INFORMATION ABOUT THEIR QUALIFICATIONS, BILLING RATE AND WILLINGNESS TO HANDLE THIS ARBITRATION. THE COURT WILL NOMINATE 5 PERSONS FROM THOSE LISTS AND UNLESS THE PARTIES NOTIFY THE COURT WTIHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S NOMINEES, THAT THEY HAVE AGREED ON AN ARBITRATOR, THE COURT WILL CHOOSE SOMEONE FROM THAT LIST OF NOMINEES. THE COURT WILL NOMINATE 5 PERSONS FROM THOSE LISTS AND UNLESS THE PARTIES NOTIFY THE COURT WTIHIN 5 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THE COURT'S NOMINEES, THAT THEY HAVE AGREED ON AN ARBITRATOR, THE COURT WILL CHOOSE SOMEONE FROM THAT LIST OF NOMINEES. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Tamra Keen CSR # 5404 =301/PJB
